---
title: "Final Project"
author: "Yasmine Graham"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Libraries 
```{r Libraries}
library(tidytext)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)      
library(stringr)    
library(lubridate)  

```


# 1. Data Loading


```{r DtaLoading}

storm_data <- read_csv("weather.csv")
twitter_data <- read_csv("Tweets-1.csv")

```

# 2. Data Cleaning


```{r DtaCleaning}

##Weather Data Cleaning

damage_to_dollars <- function(x) {
  x <- str_trim(x)   # remove extra spaces (Chapter 5)
  case_when(
    x == "" | is.na(x) ~ NA_real_,
    str_detect(x, "K") ~ as.numeric(str_sub(x, 1, -2)) * 1000,
    str_detect(x, "M") ~ as.numeric(str_sub(x, 1, -2)) * 1000000,
    TRUE ~ as.numeric(x)
  )
}

# Apply conversions
storm_data <- storm_data %>%
  mutate(
    # Convert damage columns to numeric
    DAMAGE_PROPERTY = damage_to_dollars(DAMAGE_PROPERTY),
    DAMAGE_CROPS   = damage_to_dollars(DAMAGE_CROPS),
    
    # Parse dates (format "DD-MMM-YY HH:MM:SS")
    BEGIN_DATE_TIME = ymd_hms(BEGIN_DATE_TIME),
    END_DATE_TIME   = ymd_hms(END_DATE_TIME),
    
    # Convert numeric columns (suppress warnings from blanks)
    INJURIES_DIRECT   = as.numeric(INJURIES_DIRECT),
    INJURIES_INDIRECT = as.numeric(INJURIES_INDIRECT),
    DEATHS_DIRECT     = as.numeric(DEATHS_DIRECT),
    DEATHS_INDIRECT   = as.numeric(DEATHS_INDIRECT),
    BEGIN_LAT         = as.numeric(BEGIN_LAT),
    BEGIN_LON         = as.numeric(BEGIN_LON),
    END_LAT           = as.numeric(END_LAT),
    END_LON           = as.numeric(END_LON),
    MAGNITUDE         = as.numeric(MAGNITUDE)
  ) %>%
  # Replace empty strings with NA in all character columns
  mutate(across(where(is.character), ~ na_if(str_trim(.), "")))

# View the result
glimpse(storm_data)


##Flights Data Cleaning






```


## Flights
```{r Flights}
summary(cars)
```

## Weather
```{r Weather}
summary(cars)
```

## Tweets



```{r, Tweets}

#Create data into tibble formatting
twitter_tibble <- tibble(twitter_data)

#Create unnested tokens 
twitter_unnested <- twitter_tibble %>%
  unnest_tokens(word,text)

#Create stop words for words in the bing dictionary that do not fit our context. 
stop_words <- c("like", "work", "right", "well", "enough", "free", "fine", "tough", "afford", "cheaper", "rapid","leverage")
stopwords_tibble <- tibble(word = stop_words)

#Create a table that lists the twitter sentiment
twitter_sentiment <- twitter_unnested %>%
  inner_join(get_sentiments("bing")) %>%
  anti_join(stopwords_tibble, by="word") %>%
  count(word, sentiment, sort = TRUE)

#Create a negative group to filter only negative words.
negative <- twitter_sentiment %>%
  group_by(sentiment) %>%
  filter(sentiment == "negative")

#Shows the total amount of unique negative words.
total_negative <- negative %>%
  count(sentiment, sort = TRUE)
  
#Create a positive group of to filter only positive words.
positive <- twitter_sentiment %>%
  group_by(sentiment) %>%
  filter(sentiment == "positive")

#Shows the total amount of unique positive words.
total_positive <- positive %>%
  count(sentiment, sort = TRUE)

```

# 3. Analysis


```{r Analysis}
summary(cars)
```

## Flights Patterns

```{r FlightPatterns}
summary(cars)
```

## Weather Impact
```{r WeatherImpact}
summary(cars)
```

## Sentiment Analysis
```{r SentimentAnalysis}
summary(cars)
```

# 4. Integration
```{r Integration}
summary(cars)
```

# 5. Conclusion
